evaluation.summary: Empirical bits stay at 256 for most primorial indices but unexpectedly drop to 10 at k=16, suggesting instability in the LDAB calibration framework.
next_directions: Investigate the cause of the anomalous 10-bit result at k=16, possibly due to overflow or truncation.
Validate the LDAB calibration across a broader range of k with higher-precision reference implementations.
Develop a theoretical model to explain the observed scaling and the deviation at specific indices.
